# Sankalp '27 — JK Lakshmipat University Student Orientation & Welcome Portal

> Sankalp 2027 is the official New Student Orientation and Welcome Program of JK Lakshmipat University (JKLU), Jaipur.

This portal manages check-in operations, administrative dashboards, and student registers for the orientation program.

## Portal Entrypoints

- [Home](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/): Hold page for Sankalp 2027.
- [Admin Panel](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/admin): Authorized admin dashboard for registrations, check-in validation, and system logs.
- [Scanner Portal](https://aarambh.jklu.edu.in/scanner): Ticket validator and instant check-in registry validator dashboard for check-in desks.

## Key Facts

- Event: Sankalp 2027
- Organizer: JK Lakshmipat University, Jaipur
- Location: JK Lakshmipat University, Near Mahindra SEZ, Ajmer Road, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302026
- General contact: info@jklu.edu.in
